Pack contains: 6 x class 15 metal sewing machine bobbins
For use with top and front-loading machines and sewing machines with metal bobbin cases
Stronger than alternative plastic bobbins which are liable To bulge and bend when loaded with thread
description: From the manufacturer METAL BOBBINS AND STORAGE CASE The set contains 6 Rust-roof Metal Bobbins, contained in a clear case. The clear case enables you to keep your craft space clean and tidy while being able to see which thread colours are prepared on a bobbin. FITS MOST SEWING MACHINES Korbond Class 15 Sewing Machine Bobbins are compatible with most domestic sewing machines. With over 60 years of trading, Korbond is the UK’s no. 1 trusted brand of sewing, crafting & clothes care tools and accessories. Our products are individually tailored to uphold our performance and quality standards, delivering a consistently reliable product that exceeds our customers expectations Korbond Sewing Machine Bobbins are suitable for use on most modern domestic sewing machines.
